modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Laptop won't wake up with mouse or keyboard input.

full_description_text: I'm having trouble with my Lenovo laptop. It just won't wake up when I try to move the mouse or press any keys on the keyboard. It's really frustrating because I need to get back to work! I’m using a Lenovo USB-C, and I thought it would just work fine.
short_description: Laptop won't wake up with mouse or keyboard input.
description: I'm having trouble with my Lenovo laptop. It just won't wake up when I try to move the mouse or press any keys on the keyboard. It's really frustrating because I need to get back to work! I’m using a Lenovo USB-C, and I thought it would just work fine.
